---
title: "Day 1: Overview and materials"
---

## Goals:

- See AI in action: live code understanding, revision, and reuse with AI
- Setup: Positron + GitHub Copilot + Stata
- Understand how AI works and relevant vocabulary:
  - IDE, LLM, Assistant, tokens, prompts, context window, agent, etc.
- Get ready to practice on your own during the self-study examples
- Familiarize with key principles and the workflow

## Agenda

Day 1: Introduction and common workflows

| Time        | Topic |
|-------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9:00        | 1. [Welcome, introductions, and overview (slides)](#welcome) |
| 9:10        | 2. [Setup overview (slides)](#setup-overview). [Example 0 (live)](#example-0) and [Example 1 (self-study)](#understanding-data) |
| 9:40        | 3. [Example 1: Understanding data with AI (live)](#understanding-data) |
| 10:20       | ☕ Break (10 min) |
| 10:30       | 4. [How GitHub Copilot work, and key AI concepts](#ai-concepts) |
| 10:45       | 5. [Common AI workflow and data safeguarding practices](#ai-workflow) |
| 11:00       | 6. [Self-study examples overview and Q&A](#self-study) |

## Before You Arrive

(Try) [completing the prerequisites](/prerequisites/index.qmd).

If you run into issues, check [Common Problems](/prerequisites/common-problems.qmd) or
contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org) before the session.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Day 1: materials {#materials}

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1. Learn: Welcome, introductions, and overview {#welcome}

Introduction and housekeeping, then an overview of the day's agenda and materials.

**Slides**

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck"  src="ai4coding-slides-d1-1/"></iframe>
```
View slides in a [new tab](ai4coding-slides-d1-1/){target="_blank"}.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 2. Setup overview {#setup-overview}

::: callout-warning
**Important**

> Setup your working folders properly!
:::

{{< include /day1/_working-folder.qmd >}}

**Slides**

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="ai4coding-slides-d1-2/"></iframe>
```

View slides in a [new tab](day1/ai4coding-slides-d1-2/){target="_blank"}.

#### Example 0: Test your setup (live) {#example-0}

This presentation ends with an example that demonstrates how to test
if the setup is working correctly. Example 0 could be found in [Self-Study > Example 0](selfstudy/example-0.qmd).

#### Example 1: Stata in Positron with GitHub Copilot (self-study) {#example-1}

This introductory example is plan for self-study, full details, suggested
prompts, and instructions are in the [Self-Study > Example 1](selfstudy/example-1.qmd).

{{< include /day1/_ex1-1-overview.qmd >}}

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 3. Example 2: Understanding data with AI (live) {#understanding-data}

This example is planned for live demonstration during the session, but you can
also follow along on your own as a self-study exercise. Full details, suggested
prompts, and instructions are in the [Self-Study > Example 2](selfstudy/example-2.qmd).




<!-- TODO -->

{{< include /day1/_ex1-2-overview.qmd >}}

## Presentation: How AI works, key concepts, and capabilities

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="day1/ai4coding-slides-d1-3/"></iframe>

```
View slides in a [new tab](day1/ai4coding-slides-d1-3/){target="_blank"}.

<!-- TODO: Additional materials on AI concepts and capabilities worth familiarizing with. A pills tab with links to videos and reading -->
